Tomato___Early_blight.title: Early Blight (Alternaria solani)
Tomato___Early_blight.organic: Prune lower leaves to maximize airflow. Apply copper-based organic fungicides or Bacillus subtilis treatments.
Tomato___Early_blight.chemical: Apply chlorothalonil, mancozeb, or azoxystrobin fungicides at regular intervals according to package directions.
Tomato___Early_blight.prevention: Rotate crops annually. Avoid overhead watering to keep foliage dry.

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.title: Powdery Mildew (Podosphaera clandestina)
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.organic: Apply horticultural oils or potassium bicarbonate spray to the leaves when conditions are dry.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.chemical: Use sulfur-based fungicides or synthetic myclobutanil treatments during early vegetative stages.
Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Prune tree canopies to improve sunlight penetration and air circulation.

Apple___Apple_scab.title: Apple Scab (Venturia inaequalis)
Apple___Apple_scab.organic: Rake and destroy fallen leaves in autumn to disrupt the spore cycle. Apply sulfur compounds early in spring.
Apple___Apple_scab.chemical: Deploy captan or flutriafol protective fungicides sequentially during the green-tip phase.
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention: Plant scab-resistant apple cultivars if expanding the orchard layout.

Tomato___Healthy.title: Healthy Tomato Foliage
Tomato___Healthy.organic: No remedial action required. Maintain current organic composting inputs.
Tomato___Healthy.chemical: No chemical applications required. Avoid preventative spraying to eliminate chemical runoff.
Tomato___Healthy.prevention: Monitor crops bi-weekly for any signs of early stress patches.

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.title: Corn Gray Leaf Spot (Cercospora zeae-maydis)
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.organic: Apply organic neem oil formulations or copper-based fungicides early in the season. Till old crop residue deep into the soil to destroy overwintering spores.
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.chemical: Deploy systemic group 3 or group 11 fungicides (such as pyraclostrobin or azoxystrobin) if lesions appear on the leaves below the ear before tasseling.
Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.prevention: Plant disease-resistant hybrid maize varieties and implement a minimum 2-year crop rotation away from corn to disrupt the pathogen lifecycle.
